evidence_label: mitapivat clinician-answer action ladder, not medical advice

source_checks.use_in_ladder: Adult TDT benchmark only; not an individual case answer.
Pediatric NTDT watchlist only; not interchangeable with TDT.

source_checks.status_checked: adult label with safety and interaction constraints
source_checks.use_in_ladder: Route safety, liver, and interaction questions to the clinician.
Keep diagnosis, transfusion, iron, organ, and monitoring context together.

action_ladder.private_action: Index the requested record domains privately and return to the record request matrix.
Keep the clinician rationale private unless it points to a public source.
Keep follow-up inside clinician review and do not contact access owners from public notes.
Prepare one owner-specific packet using public source URLs and private record aliases only.
action_ladder.public_repo_action: Record owner category and public source URL only.

action_ladder.private_action: Route liver, interaction, organ, or adverse-event context through the clinician.
Track pediatric registry status without adding raw case data.

release_policy: Public artifacts may include input labels, next-state labels, owner categories, and public source URLs only. Raw doctor replies, raw records, screenshots, identifiers, exact private dates, contact details, and patient-specific instructions stay out of Git.
decision_rule: A clinician answer changes the research queue, not the treatment plan. Every branch is label-only until a qualified clinician or proper owner supplies a public-safe source-backed next state.
